items.title: Kubernetes Autoscaling Demands New Observability Focus Beyond Vendor Tooling
items.summaryShort: Kubernetes Autoscaling Demands New Observability Focus Beyond Vendor Tooling. As adoption of Kubernetes autoscalers like Karpenter accelerates, a new set of platform-agnostic observability practices is emerging, shifting focus from traditio

items.title: TanStack Start Introduces Import Protection to Enforce Server and Client Boundaries
items.summaryShort: TanStack Start Introduces Import Protection to Enforce Server and Client Boundaries. TanStack Start has introduced a import protection, which aims to prevent server and client code from being mixed in full-stack React applications.

items.title: Article: Event-Driven Patterns for Cloud-Native Banking: Lessons from What Works and What Hurts
items.summaryShort: Article: Event-Driven Patterns for Cloud-Native Banking: Lessons from What Works and What Hurts. Event-driven architecture helps banks decouple systems, scale services, and create clear activity trails.

items.title: Cloudflare Adds Active API Vulnerability Scanning to Its Edge
items.summaryShort: Cloudflare Adds Active API Vulnerability Scanning to Its Edge. Cloudflare has announced the open beta of its Web and API Vulnerability Scanner.

items.title: Podcast: Failure As a Means to Build Resilient Software Systems: A Conversation with Lorin Hochstein
items.summaryShort: Podcast: Failure As a Means to Build Resilient Software Systems: A Conversation with Lorin Hochstein. In this podcast Michael Stiefel spoke to Lorin Hochstein about how real-world failures provide insight into how software systems actually

items.title: Waymo starts robotaxi services at San Antonio International Airport
items.summaryShort: Waymo starts robotaxi services at San Antonio International Airport. It's the fourth airport Waymo is serving, adding to Phoenix Sky Harbor, San Francisco, and San Jose International airports.

items.title: Speechify's Windows app uses local models for transcription and dictation
items.summaryShort: Speechify's Windows app uses local models for transcription and dictation. Speechify just launched a native Windows app that employs locally stored models to enable dictation and transcription across apps.

items.title: With its new app store, Ring bets on AI to go beyond home security
items.summaryShort: With its new app store, Ring bets on AI to go beyond home security. Ring's app store will allow the company to target broader use cases beyond security, like elder care or business needs.
